# ANDURIL INDUSTRIES ACQUIRES SOLID ROCKET MOTOR MANUFACTURER ADRANOS

Anduril acquires Adranos to become a merchant supplier of solid rocket motors, bringing advanced ALITEC fuel technology and modern manufacturing to the defense industry.
